response.overview: Showstopper! The Improvised Musical show 948, filmed before a live audience at the Pleasance Grand at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe 2018 and released on DVD.  Setting: Camping, the Highlands.  A modern-day Greek myth featuring romance, adventure and surprisingly located elephants. Featuring music in the styles of Sondheim, Priscilla Queen of the Desert, Jesus Christ Superstar and In the Heights.
response.tagline: A completely improvised musical, made up on the spot and filmed live!
response.title: Showstopper! The Improvised Musical — ‘Tent!’
